passed_checks.check_name: Ensure no hard coded AWS access key and secret key exists in provider
code_block:
provider "aws" {
  access_key                  = "test"
  secret_key                  = "test"
  region                      = "us-east-1"
  s3_use_path_style           = true
  skip_credentials_validation = true
  skip_metadata_api_check     = true
  skip_requesting_account_id  = true
}
